title: Version History in Monday Docs to have Saved versions
excerpt: Monday docs auto saves every 10 minutes but if an editing session takes more than 30 minutes, you have to search through 3 different versions to see what edits were made. It would be nice to have the ability to group the…

posts.author: Liz-Perry (Liz Perry - Polished Geek)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday docs auto saves every 10 minutes but if an editing session takes more than 30 minutes, you have to search through 3 different versions to see what edits were made. It would be nice to have the ability to group these versions together if the edits were all made by one person, and to also be able to name versions as you can in Google Docs.
